arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

arabic text: وَقَالَ الَّذِينَ لَا يَرْجُونَ لِقَاءَنَا لَوْلَا أُنزِلَ عَلَيْنَا الْمَلَائِكَةُ أَوْ نَرَىٰ رَبَّنَا ۗ لَقَدِ اسْتَكْبَرُوا فِي أَنفُسِهِمْ وَعَتَوْا عُتُوًّا كَبِيرًا
english translation text:
Those who do not expect to encounter Us say, ‘Why have angels not been sent down to us, or why do we not see our Lord?’ Certainly, they are full of arrogance within their souls and have become terribly defiant.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَ الْمَلَائِكَةَ لَا بُشْرَىٰ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُجْرِمِينَ وَيَقُولُونَ حِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا
english translation text:
The day they will see the angels, there will be no good news for the guilty on that day, and they will say, ‘Keep off [from paradise]!’
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَقَدِمْنَا إِلَىٰ مَا عَمِلُوا مِنْ عَمَلٍ فَجَعَلْنَاهُ هَبَاءً مَّنثُورًا
english translation text:
Then We shall attend to the works they have done and then turn them into scattered dust.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: أَصْحَابُ الْجَنَّةِ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَيْرٌ مُّسْتَقَرًّا وَأَحْسَنُ مَقِيلًا
english translation text:
On that day the inhabitants of paradise will be in the best abode and an excellent resting place.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَيَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ السَّمَاءُ بِالْغَمَامِ وَنُزِّلَ الْمَلَائِكَةُ تَنزِيلًا
english translation text:
The day when the sky with its clouds will be split open, and the angels will be sent down [in a majestic] descent,
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: الْمُلْكُ يَوْمَئِذٍ الْحَقُّ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ ۚ وَكَانَ يَوْمًا عَلَى الْكَافِرِينَ عَسِيرًا
english translation text:
on that day true sovereignty will belong to the All-beneficent, and it will be a hard day for the faithless.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَيَوْمَ يَعَضُّ الظَّالِمُ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْهِ يَقُولُ يَا لَيْتَنِي اتَّخَذْتُ مَعَ الرَّسُولِ سَبِيلًا
english translation text:
It will be a day when the wrongdoer will bite his hands, saying, ‘I wish I had followed the Apostle’s way!
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: يَا وَيْلَتَىٰ لَيْتَنِي لَمْ أَتَّخِذْ فُلَانًا خَلِيلًا
english translation text:
Woe to me! I wish I had not taken so and so as a friend!
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: لَّقَدْ أَضَلَّنِي عَنِ الذِّكْرِ بَعْدَ إِذْ جَاءَنِي ۗ وَكَانَ الشَّيْطَانُ لِلْإِنسَانِ خَذُولًا
english translation text:
Certainly he led me astray from the Reminder after it had come to me, and Satan is a deserter of man.’
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَقَالَ الرَّسُولُ يَا رَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِي اتَّخَذُوا هَٰذَا الْقُرْآنَ مَهْجُورًا
english translation text:
And the Apostle will say, ‘O my Lord! Indeed my people consigned this Quran to oblivion.’
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَكَذَٰلِكَ جَعَلْنَا لِكُلِّ نَبِيٍّ عَدُوًّا مِّنَ الْمُجْرِمِينَ ۗ وَكَفَىٰ بِرَبِّكَ هَادِيًا وَنَصِيرًا
english translation text:
That is how for every prophet We assigned an enemy from among the guilty, and your Lord suffices as helper and guide.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَقَالَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ الْقُرْآنُ جُمْلَةً وَاحِدَةً ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ لِنُثَبِّتَ بِهِ فُؤَادَكَ ۖ وَرَتَّلْنَاهُ تَرْتِيلًا
english translation text:
The faithless say, ‘Why has not the Quran been sent down to him all at once?’ So it was, that We may strengthen your heart with it, and We have recited it [to you] in a measured tone.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَلَا يَأْتُونَكَ بِمَثَلٍ إِلَّا جِئْنَاكَ بِالْحَقِّ وَأَحْسَنَ تَفْسِيرًا
english translation text:
They do not bring you any representation but that We bring you the truth [in reply to them] and the best exposition.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: الَّذِينَ يُحْشَرُونَ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ أُولَٰئِكَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
english translation text:
Those who will be mustered [fallen] on their faces toward hell, they are the worse situated and further astray from the [right] way.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَا مُوسَى الْكِتَابَ وَجَعَلْنَا مَعَهُ أَخَاهُ هَارُونَ وَزِيرًا
english translation text:
Certainly We gave Moses the Book and We made Aaron, his brother, accompany him as a minister.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: فَقُلْنَا اذْهَبَا إِلَى الْقَوْمِ الَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا بِآيَاتِنَا فَدَمَّرْنَاهُمْ تَدْمِيرًا
english translation text:
Then We said, ‘Let the two of you go to the people who have denied Our signs.’ Then We destroyed them utterly.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ لَّمَّا كَذَّبُوا الرُّسُلَ أَغْرَقْنَاهُمْ وَجَعَلْنَاهُمْ لِلنَّاسِ آيَةً ۖ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
english translation text:
And Noah’s people, We drowned them when they impugned the apostles, and We made them a sign for mankind, and We have prepared for the wrongdoers a painful punishment.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَعَادًا وَثَمُودَ وَأَصْحَابَ الرَّسِّ وَقُرُونًا بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ كَثِيرًا
english translation text:
And ‘Ad and Thamud, and the people of Rass, and many generations between them.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَكُلًّا ضَرَبْنَا لَهُ الْأَمْثَالَ ۖ وَكُلًّا تَبَّرْنَا تَتْبِيرًا
english translation text:
For each of them We drew examples, and each We destroyed utterly.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَتَوْا عَلَى الْقَرْيَةِ الَّتِي أُمْطِرَتْ مَطَرَ السَّوْءِ ۚ أَفَلَمْ يَكُونُوا يَرَوْنَهَا ۚ بَلْ كَانُوا لَا يَرْجُونَ نُشُورًا
english translation text:
Certainly they must have passed the town on which an evil shower was rained. Have they not seen it? Rather, they did not expect resurrection [to happen].
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَإِذَا رَأَوْكَ إِن يَتَّخِذُونَكَ إِلَّا هُزُوًا أَهَٰذَا الَّذِي بَعَثَ اللَّهُ رَسُولًا
english translation text:
When they see you they just take you in derision: ‘Is this the one whom Allah has sent as an apostle!?
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: إِن كَادَ لَيُضِلُّنَا عَنْ آلِهَتِنَا لَوْلَا أَن صَبَرْنَا عَلَيْهَا ۚ وَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ حِينَ يَرَوْنَ الْعَذَابَ مَنْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
english translation text:
Indeed he was about to lead us astray from our gods, had we not stood firm by them.’ Soon they will know, when they sight the punishment, who is further astray from the [right] way.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: أَرَأَيْتَ مَنِ اتَّخَذَ إِلَٰهَهُ هَوَاهُ أَفَأَنتَ تَكُونُ عَلَيْهِ وَكِيلًا
english translation text:
Have you seen him who has taken his desire to be his god? Is it your duty to watch over him?
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: أَمْ تَحْسَبُ أَنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ يَسْمَعُونَ أَوْ يَعْقِلُونَ ۚ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا كَالْأَنْعَامِ ۖ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
english translation text:
Do you suppose that most of them listen or exercise their reason? They are just like cattle; indeed, they are further astray from the way.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَيْفَ مَدَّ الظِّلَّ وَلَوْ شَاءَ لَجَعَلَهُ سَاكِنًا ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَا الشَّمْسَ عَلَيْهِ دَلِيلًا
english translation text:
Have you not regarded how your Lord spreads the twilight? (Had He wished He would have made it stand still.) Then We made the sun a beacon for it.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: ثُمَّ قَبَضْنَاهُ إِلَيْنَا قَبْضًا يَسِيرًا
english translation text:
Then We retract it toward Ourselves, with a gentle retracting.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَهُوَ الَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اللَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا وَالنَّوْمَ سُبَاتًا وَجَعَلَ النَّهَارَ نُشُورًا
english translation text:
It is He who made for you the night as a covering and sleep for rest and He made the day a recall to life.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَهُوَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلَ الرِّيَاحَ بُشْرًا بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ ۚ وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً طَهُورًا
english translation text:
And it is He who sends the winds as harbingers of His mercy, and We send down from the sky purifying water,
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: لِّنُحْيِيَ بِهِ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا وَنُسْقِيَهُ مِمَّا خَلَقْنَا أَنْعَامًا وَأَنَاسِيَّ كَثِيرًا
english translation text:
with which We revive a dead country and provide water to many of the cattle and humans We have created.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ صَرَّفْنَاهُ بَيْنَهُمْ لِيَذَّكَّرُوا فَأَبَىٰ أَكْثَرُ النَّاسِ إِلَّا كُفُورًا
english translation text:
Certainly We distribute it among them so that they may take admonition. But most people are only intent on ingratitude.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَلَوْ شِئْنَا لَبَعَثْنَا فِي كُلِّ قَرْيَةٍ نَّذِيرًا
english translation text:
Had We wished, We would have sent a warner to every town.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: فَلَا تُطِعِ الْكَافِرِينَ وَجَاهِدْهُم بِهِ جِهَادًا كَبِيرًا
english translation text:
So do not obey the faithless, but wage a great jihad against them with it.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَهُوَ الَّذِي مَرَجَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ هَٰذَا عَذْبٌ فُرَاتٌ وَهَٰذَا مِلْحٌ أُجَاجٌ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخًا وَحِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا
english translation text:
It is He who merged the two seas: this one sweet and agreeable, and that one briny and bitter, and between the two He set a barrier and a forbidding hindrance.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَهُوَ الَّذِي خَلَقَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ بَشَرًا فَجَعَلَهُ نَسَبًا وَصِهْرًا ۗ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ قَدِيرًا
english translation text:
It is He who created the human being from water, then invested him with ties of blood and marriage, and your Lord is all-powerful.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَيَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُهُمْ وَلَا يَضُرُّهُمْ ۗ وَكَانَ الْكَافِرُ عَلَىٰ رَبِّهِ ظَهِيرًا
english translation text:
They worship besides Allah that which neither brings them any benefit nor causes them any harm, and the faithless one is ever an abettor against his Lord.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ إِلَّا مُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا
english translation text:
We did not send you except as a bearer of good news and as a warner.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: قُلْ مَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ إِلَّا مَن شَاءَ أَن يَتَّخِذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ سَبِيلًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘I do not ask you any reward for it, except that anyone who wishes should take the way to his Lord.’
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى الْحَيِّ الَّذِي لَا يَمُوتُ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِهِ ۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِهِ بِذُنُوبِ عِبَادِهِ خَبِيرًا
english translation text:
Put your trust in the Living One who does not die, and celebrate His praise. He suffices as one all-aware of the sins of His servants.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: الَّذِي خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ اسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ ۚ الرَّحْمَٰنُ فَاسْأَلْ بِهِ خَبِيرًا
english translation text:
He, who created the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them in six days, and then settled on the Throne, the All-beneficent; so ask someone who is well aware about Him.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ اسْجُدُوا لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ قَالُوا وَمَا الرَّحْمَٰنُ أَنَسْجُدُ لِمَا تَأْمُرُنَا وَزَادَهُمْ نُفُورًا ۩
english translation text:
When they are told: ‘Prostrate yourselves before the All-beneficent,’ they say, ‘What is ‘‘the All-beneficent’’? Shall we prostrate ourselves before whatever you bid us?’ And it increases their aversion.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي جَعَلَ فِي السَّمَاءِ بُرُوجًا وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا سِرَاجًا وَقَمَرًا مُّنِيرًا
english translation text:
Blessed is He who appointed houses in the sky and set in it a lamp and a shining moon.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَهُوَ الَّذِي جَعَلَ اللَّيْلَ وَالنَّهَارَ خِلْفَةً لِّمَنْ أَرَادَ أَن يَذَّكَّرَ أَوْ أَرَادَ شُكُورًا
english translation text:
It is He who made the night and the day alternate for someone who desires to take admonition, or desires to give thanks.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَعِبَادُ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ الْجَاهِلُونَ قَالُوا سَلَامًا
english translation text:
The servants of the All-beneficent are those who walk humbly on the earth, and when the ignorant address them, say, ‘Peace!’
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ يَبِيتُونَ لِرَبِّهِمْ سُجَّدًا وَقِيَامًا
english translation text:
Those who spend the night for their Lord, prostrating and standing [in worship].
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا
english translation text:
Those who say, ‘Our Lord! Turn away from us the punishment of hell. Indeed its punishment is enduring.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: إِنَّهَا سَاءَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا
english translation text:
Indeed it is an evil station and abode.’
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ إِذَا أَنفَقُوا لَمْ يُسْرِفُوا وَلَمْ يَقْتُرُوا وَكَانَ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ قَوَامًا
english translation text:
Those who are neither wasteful nor tightfisted when spending, but balanced between these [two extremes].
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ لَا يَدْعُونَ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ وَلَا يَقْتُلُونَ النَّفْسَ الَّتِي حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّ وَلَا يَزْنُونَ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ يَلْقَ أَثَامًا
english translation text:
Those who do not invoke another deity besides Allah, and do not kill a soul [whose life] Allah has made inviolable, except with due cause, and do not commit fornication. (Whoever does that shall encounter its retribution,
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: يُضَاعَفْ لَهُ الْعَذَابُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَيَخْلُدْ فِيهِ مُهَانًا
english translation text:
the punishment being doubled for him on the Day of Resurrection. In it he will abide in humiliation forever,
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَآمَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلًا صَالِحًا فَأُولَٰئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ اللَّهُ سَيِّئَاتِهِمْ حَسَنَاتٍ ۗ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا
english translation text:
except those who repent, attain faith, and act righteously. For such, Allah will replace their misdeeds with good deeds, and Allah is all-forgiving, all-merciful.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَمَن تَابَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَإِنَّهُ يَتُوبُ إِلَى اللَّهِ مَتَابًا
english translation text:
And whoever repents and acts righteously indeed turns to Allah with due penitence).
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ لَا يَشْهَدُونَ الزُّورَ وَإِذَا مَرُّوا بِاللَّغْوِ مَرُّوا كِرَامًا
english translation text:
Those who do not give false testimony, and when they come upon frivolity, pass by with dignity.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَمْ يَخِرُّوا عَلَيْهَا صُمًّا وَعُمْيَانًا
english translation text:
Those who, when reminded of the signs of their Lord, do not turn a deaf ear and a blind eye to them.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
english translation text:
And those who say, ‘Our Lord! Give us joy and comfort in our spouses and offspring, and make us imams of the Godwary.’
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: أُولَٰئِكَ يُجْزَوْنَ الْغُرْفَةَ بِمَا صَبَرُوا وَيُلَقَّوْنَ فِيهَا تَحِيَّةً وَسَلَامًا
english translation text:
Those shall be rewarded with sublime abodes for their patience and steadfastness, and they shall be met there with greetings and ‘Peace,’
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ حَسُنَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا
english translation text:
to abide in them [forever], an excellent station and abode.
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: قُلْ مَا يَعْبَأُ بِكُمْ رَبِّي لَوْلَا دُعَاؤُكُمْ ۖ فَقَدْ كَذَّبْتُمْ فَسَوْفَ يَكُونُ لِزَامًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘Were it not for the sake of summoning you [to faith], what store my Lord would have set by you? But you impugned [me and my summons], so it will soon follow as a result.’
Al Furqan – The Criterian

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: طسم
english translation text:
Ta, Seen, Meem.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: تِلْكَ آيَاتُ الْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ
english translation text:
These are the signs of the Manifest Book.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: لَعَلَّكَ بَاخِعٌ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا مُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
You are liable to imperil your life [out of distress] that they will not have faith.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ السَّمَاءِ آيَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَاقُهُمْ لَهَا خَاضِعِينَ
english translation text:
If We wish We will send down to them a sign from the sky before which their heads will remain bowed in humility.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّنَ الرَّحْمَٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
english translation text:
There does not come to them any new reminder from the All-beneficent but that they disregard it.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنبَاءُ مَا كَانُوا بِهِ يَسْتَهْزِئُونَ
english translation text:
They have already denied [the truth], but soon there will come to them the news of what they have been deriding.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا إِلَى الْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ
english translation text:
Have they not regarded the earth, how many of every splendid kind [of vegetation] We have caused to grow in it?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
There is indeed a sign in that; but most of them do not have faith.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord is the All-mighty, the All-merciful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰ أَنِ ائْتِ الْقَوْمَ الظَّالِمِينَ
english translation text:
When your Lord called out to Moses: [saying,] ‘Go to those wrongdoing people,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ أَلَا يَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
the people of Pharaoh. Will they not be wary [of Allah]?’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! I fear they will impugn me,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِي وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِي فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَارُونَ
english translation text:
and I will become upset and my tongue will fail me. So send for Aaron [to join me].
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَلَهُمْ عَلَيَّ ذَنبٌ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ
english translation text:
Besides, they have a charge against me, and I fear they will kill me.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَاذْهَبَا بِآيَاتِنَا ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Certainly not! Let both of you go with Our signs: We will indeed be with you, hearing [everything].
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَا إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
So approach Pharaoh and say, ‘‘We are indeed envoys of the Lord of the worlds
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَنْ أَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ
english translation text:
that you let the Children of Israel leave with us.’’ ’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
english translation text:
He [i.e. Pharaoh] said, ‘Did we not rear you as a child among us, and did you not stay with us for years of your life?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ الَّتِي فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ
english translation text:
Then you committed that deed of yours, and you are an ingrate.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَا إِذًا وَأَنَا مِنَ الضَّالِّينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘I did that when I was astray.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِي رَبِّي حُكْمًا وَجَعَلَنِي مِنَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
english translation text:
So I fled from you, as I was afraid of you. Then my Lord gave me sound judgement and made me one of the apostles.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَيَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ
english translation text:
That you have enslaved the Children of Israel—is that the favour with which you reproach me?’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَا رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘And what is ‘‘the Lord of all the worlds?’’ ’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘The Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them,—should you have conviction.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ لِمَنْ حَوْلَهُ أَلَا تَسْتَمِعُونَ
english translation text:
He said to those who were around him, ‘Don’t you hear?!’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ آبَائِكُمُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Your Lord, and the Lord of your forefathers!’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ الَّذِي أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Indeed your messenger, who has been sent to you, is surely crazy!’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ رَبُّ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘The Lord of the east and the west and whatever is between them—should you exercise your reason.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ لَئِنِ اتَّخَذْتَ إِلَٰهًا غَيْرِي لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ الْمَسْجُونِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘If you take up any god other than me, I will surely make you a prisoner!’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكَ بِشَيْءٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
He said, ‘What if I bring you something [as an] unmistakable [proof]?’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Then bring it, should you be truthful.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِيَ ثُعْبَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
Thereat he threw down his staff, and behold, it was a manifest python.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُ فَإِذَا هِيَ بَيْضَاءُ لِلنَّاظِرِينَ
english translation text:
Then he drew out his hand, and behold, it was white and bright to the onlookers.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَسَاحِرٌ عَلِيمٌ
english translation text:
He said to the elite [who stood] around him, ‘This is indeed an expert magician
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
english translation text:
who seeks to expel you from your land with his magic. So what do you advise?’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَابْعَثْ فِي الْمَدَائِنِ حَاشِرِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Put him and his brother off for a while, and send heralds to the cities
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: يَأْتُوكَ بِكُلِّ سَحَّارٍ عَلِيمٍ
english translation text:
to bring you every expert magician.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَجُمِعَ السَّحَرَةُ لِمِيقَاتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
english translation text:
So the magicians were gathered for the tryst of a known day,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَقِيلَ لِلنَّاسِ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّجْتَمِعُونَ
english translation text:
and the people were told: ‘Will you all gather?!’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ السَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُوا هُمُ الْغَالِبِينَ
english translation text:
‘Maybe we will follow the magicians, if they are victors!’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَلَمَّا جَاءَ السَّحَرَةُ قَالُوا لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحْنُ الْغَالِبِينَ
english translation text:
So when the magicians came, they said to Pharaoh, ‘Shall we have a reward if we were to be the victors?’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّمِنَ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Of course; and you will be among members of my inner circle.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ أَلْقُوا مَا أَنتُم مُّلْقُونَ
english translation text:
Moses said to them, ‘Throw down whatever you have to throw!’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَلْقَوْا حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُوا بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ الْغَالِبُونَ
english translation text:
So they threw down their sticks and ropes, and said, ‘By the might of Pharaoh, we shall surely be victorious!’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِيَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ
english translation text:
Thereat Moses threw down his staff, and behold, it was swallowing what they had faked.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأُلْقِيَ السَّحَرَةُ سَاجِدِينَ
english translation text:
Thereat the magicians fell down prostrating.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا آمَنَّا بِرَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘We believe in the Lord of all the worlds,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: رَبِّ مُوسَىٰ وَهَارُونَ
english translation text:
the Lord of Moses and Aaron.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ آمَنتُمْ لَهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ آذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ الَّذِي عَلَّمَكُمُ السِّحْرَ فَلَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ۚ
english translation text:
He [i.e. Pharaoh] said, ‘Do you profess faith in Him before I should permit you? He is indeed your chief who has taught you magic! Soon you will know!
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَافٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
I will cut off your hands and feet from opposite sides, and I will crucify you all.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘[There is] no harm [in that]! Indeed, we shall return to our Lord.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَايَانَا أَن كُنَّا أَوَّلَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
Indeed we hope our Lord will forgive us our offences for being the first to believe.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَأَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
english translation text:
Then We revealed to Moses, [saying],‘Set out with My servants at night, for you will be pursued.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَرْسَلَ فِرْعَوْنُ فِي الْمَدَائِنِ حَاشِرِينَ
english translation text:
Then Pharaoh sent heralds to the cities,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ لَشِرْذِمَةٌ قَلِيلُونَ
english translation text:
[proclaiming:] ‘These are indeed a small band.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّهُمْ لَنَا لَغَائِظُونَ
english translation text:
They have aroused our wrath,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّا لَجَمِيعٌ حَاذِرُونَ
english translation text:
and we are alert and fully prepared.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَخْرَجْنَاهُم مِّن جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
english translation text:
So We took them out of gardens and springs,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَكُنُوزٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ
english translation text:
and [made them leave behind] treasures and stately homes.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ وَأَوْرَثْنَاهَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ
english translation text:
So it was; and We bequeathed them to the Children of Israel.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَتْبَعُوهُم مُّشْرِقِينَ
english translation text:
Then they pursued them at sunrise.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَلَمَّا تَرَاءَى الْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَابُ مُوسَىٰ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ
english translation text:
When the two hosts sighted each other, the companions of Moses said, ‘Indeed we have been caught up.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ إِنَّ مَعِيَ رَبِّي سَيَهْدِينِ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Certainly not! Indeed my Lord is with me. He will guide me.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ أَنِ اضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ الْبَحْرَ ۖ فَانفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍ كَالطَّوْدِ الْعَظِيمِ
english translation text:
Thereupon We revealed to Moses: ‘Strike the sea with your staff!’ Whereupon it parted, and each part was as if it were a great mountain.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَأَزْلَفْنَا ثَمَّ الْآخَرِينَ
english translation text:
There, We brought the others near,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَأَنجَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَمَن مَّعَهُ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
and We delivered Moses and all those who were with him.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا الْآخَرِينَ
english translation text:
Then We drowned the rest.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
There is indeed a sign in that, but most of them do not have faith.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord is the All-mighty, the All-merciful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَاتْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ نَبَأَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
english translation text:
Relate to them the account of Abraham
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
english translation text:
when he said to his father and his people, ‘What is it that you are worshiping?!’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَاكِفِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘We worship idols, and are constant in our devotion to them.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ هَلْ يَسْمَعُونَكُمْ إِذْ تَدْعُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Do they hear you when you call them?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَوْ يَنفَعُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَضُرُّونَ
english translation text:
Or do they bring you any benefit, or cause you any harm?’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا بَلْ وَجَدْنَا آبَاءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Indeed, we found our fathers doing likewise.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ أَفَرَأَيْتُم مَّا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Have you regarded what you have been worshipping,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَنتُمْ وَآبَاؤُكُمُ الْأَقْدَمُونَ
english translation text:
you and your ancestors?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِّي إِلَّا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
They are indeed enemies to me, but the Lord of all the worlds,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: الَّذِي خَلَقَنِي فَهُوَ يَهْدِينِ
english translation text:
who created me, it is He who guides me,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَالَّذِي هُوَ يُطْعِمُنِي وَيَسْقِينِ
english translation text:
and provides me with food and drink,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِذَا مَرِضْتُ فَهُوَ يَشْفِينِ
english translation text:
and when I get sick, it is He who cures me;
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَالَّذِي يُمِيتُنِي ثُمَّ يُحْيِينِ
english translation text:
who will make me die, then He will bring me to life,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَالَّذِي أَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لِي خَطِيئَتِي يَوْمَ الدِّينِ
english translation text:
and who, I hope, will forgive me my faults on the Day of Retribution.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
english translation text:
‘My Lord! Grant me [unerring] judgement, and unite me with the Righteous.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَاجْعَل لِّي لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِي الْآخِرِينَ
english translation text:
Confer on me a worthy repute among the posterity,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْنِي مِن وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ النَّعِيمِ
english translation text:
and make me one of the heirs to the paradise of bliss.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِأَبِي إِنَّهُ كَانَ مِنَ الضَّالِّينَ
english translation text:
Forgive my father, for he is one of those who are astray.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَلَا تُخْزِنِي يَوْمَ يُبْعَثُونَ
english translation text:
Do not disgrace me on the day that they will be resurrected,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ
english translation text:
the day when neither wealth nor children will avail,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى اللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ
english translation text:
except him who comes to Allah with a sound heart,’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَأُزْلِفَتِ الْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ
english translation text:
and paradise will be brought near for the Godwary,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَبُرِّزَتِ الْجَحِيمُ لِلْغَاوِينَ
english translation text:
and hell will be brought into view for the perverse,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
english translation text:
and they shall be told: ‘Where is that which you used to worship
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ
english translation text:
besides Allah? Do they help you, or do they help each other?’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَكُبْكِبُوا فِيهَا هُمْ وَالْغَاوُونَ
english translation text:
Then they will be cast into it on their faces—they and the perverse,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَجُنُودُ إِبْلِيسَ أَجْمَعُونَ
english translation text:
and the hosts of Iblis all together.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا وَهُمْ فِيهَا يَخْتَصِمُونَ
english translation text:
They will say, as they wrangle in it [together],
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: تَاللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِي ضَلَالٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
‘By Allah, we had indeed been in manifest error
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِذْ نُسَوِّيكُم بِرَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
when we equated you with the Lord of all the worlds!
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا أَضَلَّنَا إِلَّا الْمُجْرِمُونَ
english translation text:
No one led us astray except the guilty.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَمَا لَنَا مِن شَافِعِينَ
english translation text:
Now we have no intercessors,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَلَا صَدِيقٍ حَمِيمٍ
english translation text:
nor do we have any sympathetic friend.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
Had there been another turn for us, we would be among the faithful.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
There is indeed a sign in that; but most of them do not have faith.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord is the All-mighty, the All-merciful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
english translation text:
The people of Noah impugned the apostles
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
when Noah, their brother, said to them, ‘Will you not be wary [of Allah]?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنِّي لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
english translation text:
Indeed I am a trusted apostle [sent] to you.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english translation text:
So be wary of Allah and obey me.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
I do not ask you any reward for it; my reward lies only with the Lord of all the worlds.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english translation text:
So be wary of Allah and obey me.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا أَنُؤْمِنُ لَكَ وَاتَّبَعَكَ الْأَرْذَلُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Shall we believe in you, when it is the riffraff who follow you?’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِي بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘What do I know as to what they used to do?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّي ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ
english translation text:
Their reckoning is only with my Lord, should you be aware.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا أَنَا بِطَارِدِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
I will not drive away the faithful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنْ أَنَا إِلَّا نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
I am just a manifest warner.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَا نُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْمَرْجُومِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Noah, if you do not desist, you will certainly be stoned [to death].’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِي كَذَّبُونِ
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Indeed my people have impugned me.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَافْتَحْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًا وَنَجِّنِي وَمَن مَّعِيَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
So judge conclusively between me and them, and deliver me and the faithful who are with me.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَنجَيْنَاهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُ فِي الْفُلْكِ الْمَشْحُونِ
english translation text:
Thereupon We delivered him and those who were with him in the laden ark.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا بَعْدُ الْبَاقِينَ
english translation text:
Then We drowned the rest.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
There is indeed a sign in that; but most of them do not have faith.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord is the All-mighty, the All-merciful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
english translation text:
[The people of] ‘Ad impugned the apostles,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
when Hud, their brother, said to them, ‘Will you not be wary [of Allah]?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنِّي لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
english translation text:
Indeed I am a trusted apostle [sent] to you.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english translation text:
So be wary of Allah and obey me.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
I do not ask you any reward for it; my reward lies only with the Lord of all the worlds.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَتَبْنُونَ بِكُلِّ رِيعٍ آيَةً تَعْبَثُونَ
english translation text:
Do you build futile a sign on every prominence?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَتَتَّخِذُونَ مَصَانِعَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَخْلُدُونَ
english translation text:
You set up structures as if you will be immortal,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِذَا بَطَشْتُم بَطَشْتُمْ جَبَّارِينَ
english translation text:
and when you seize [someone for punishment], you seize [him] like tyrants.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english translation text:
So be wary of Allah and obey me.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَاتَّقُوا الَّذِي أَمَدَّكُم بِمَا تَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
Be wary of Him who has provided you with whatever you know,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَمَدَّكُم بِأَنْعَامٍ وَبَنِينَ
english translation text:
and aided you with sons and with cattle,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَجَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
english translation text:
gardens and springs.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنِّي أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
english translation text:
Indeed I fear for you the punishment of a tremendous day.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا سَوَاءٌ عَلَيْنَا أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ الْوَاعِظِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘It is the same to us whether you exhort us or not.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنْ هَٰذَا إِلَّا خُلُقُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
These are nothing but the traditions of the ancients,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
english translation text:
and we will not be punished.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَاهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
So they impugned him, whereupon We destroyed them. There is indeed a sign in that; but most of them do not have faith.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord is the All-mighty, the All-merciful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
english translation text:
[The people of] Thamud impugned the apostles
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَالِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
when Salih, their brother, said to them, ‘Will you not be wary [of Allah]?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنِّي لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
english translation text:
Indeed I am a trusted apostle [sent] to you.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english translation text:
So be wary of Allah and obey me.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
I do not ask you any reward for it; my reward lies only with the Lord of all the worlds.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَتُتْرَكُونَ فِي مَا هَاهُنَا آمِنِينَ
english translation text:
Will you be left secure in that which is here
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فِي جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
english translation text:
—amid gardens and springs,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَزُرُوعٍ وَنَخْلٍ طَلْعُهَا هَضِيمٌ
english translation text:
farms and date palms with dainty spathes
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَتَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ الْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا فَارِهِينَ
english translation text:
—while you skillfully hew out houses from the mountains?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english translation text:
So be wary of Allah and obey me,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَلَا تُطِيعُوا أَمْرَ الْمُسْرِفِينَ
english translation text:
and do not obey the dictates of the transgressors,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: الَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
english translation text:
who cause corruption in the land and do not bring about reform.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا إِنَّمَا أَنتَ مِنَ الْمُسَحَّرِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Indeed you are one of the bewitched.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: مَا أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِآيَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ
english translation text:
You are just a human being like us. So bring us a sign, should you be truthful.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ هَٰذِهِ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
english translation text:
He said, ‘This is a she-camel; she shall drink and you shall drink on known days.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوءٍ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
english translation text:
Do not cause her any harm, for then you shall be seized by the punishment of a terrible day.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَعَقَرُوهَا فَأَصْبَحُوا نَادِمِينَ
english translation text:
But they hamstrung her, whereupon they became regretful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَخَذَهُمُ الْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
So the punishment seized them. There is indeed a sign in that; but most of them do not have faith.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord is the All-mighty, the All-merciful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
english translation text:
The people of Lot impugned the apostles
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
when Lot, their brother, said to them, ‘Will you not be wary [of Allah]?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنِّي لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
english translation text:
Indeed I am a trusted apostle [sent] to you.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english translation text:
So be wary of Allah and obey me.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
I do not ask you any reward for it; my reward lies only with the Lord of all the worlds.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَتَأْتُونَ الذُّكْرَانَ مِنَ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
What! Of all people do you come to males,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَاجِكُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ
english translation text:
abandoning your wives your Lord has created for you? Indeed, you are a transgressing lot.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَا لُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْمُخْرَجِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Lot, if you do not desist, you will surely be banished.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ إِنِّي لِعَمَلِكُم مِّنَ الْقَالِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Indeed I detest your conduct.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: رَبِّ نَجِّنِي وَأَهْلِي مِمَّا يَعْمَلُونَ
english translation text:
‘My Lord! Deliver me and my family from what they do.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَنَجَّيْنَاهُ وَأَهْلَهُ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
So We delivered him and all his family,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِلَّا عَجُوزًا فِي الْغَابِرِينَ
english translation text:
except an old woman who remained behind.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: ثُمَّ دَمَّرْنَا الْآخَرِينَ
english translation text:
Then We destroyed [all] the rest,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَاءَ مَطَرُ الْمُنذَرِينَ
english translation text:
and rained down upon them a rain [of stones]. Evil was the rain of those who were warned!
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
There is indeed a sign in that; but most of them do not have faith.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord is the All-mighty, the All-merciful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: كَذَّبَ أَصْحَابُ الْأَيْكَةِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
english translation text:
The inhabitants of Aykah impugned the apostles,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
when Shu‘ayb said to them, ‘Will you not be wary [of Allah]?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنِّي لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
english translation text:
Indeed I am a trusted apostle [sent] to you.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english translation text:
So be wary of Allah and obey me.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
I do not ask you any reward for it; my reward lies only with the Lord of all the worlds.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا مِنَ الْمُخْسِرِينَ
english translation text:
Observe the full measure, and do not be of those who give short measure.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَزِنُوا بِالْقِسْطَاسِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ
english translation text:
Weigh with an even balance,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا النَّاسَ أَشْيَاءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا فِي الْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
english translation text:
and do not cheat the people of their goods. Do not act wickedly on the earth, causing corruption.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَاتَّقُوا الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ وَالْجِبِلَّةَ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
Be wary of Him who created you and the earlier generations.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالُوا إِنَّمَا أَنتَ مِنَ الْمُسَحَّرِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Indeed you are one of the bewitched.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ الْكَاذِبِينَ
english translation text:
You are just a human being like us, and we indeed consider you to be a liar.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ السَّمَاءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ
english translation text:
Make a fragment of the sky falls upon us, should you be truthful.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّي أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord knows best what you are doing.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ الظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
english translation text:
So they impugned him, and then they were overtaken by the punishment of the day of the overshadowing cloud. It was indeed the punishment of a terrible day.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
There is indeed a sign in that; but most of them do not have faith.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord is the All-mighty, the All-merciful.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّهُ لَتَنزِيلُ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
This is indeed [a Book] sent down by the Lord of all the worlds,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: نَزَلَ بِهِ الرُّوحُ الْأَمِينُ
english translation text:
brought down by the Trustworthy Spirit
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: عَلَىٰ قَلْبِكَ لِتَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُنذِرِينَ
english translation text:
upon your heart (so that you may be one of the warners),
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِيٍّ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
in a clear Arabic language.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَإِنَّهُ لَفِي زُبُرِ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
It is indeed [foretold] in the scriptures of the ancients.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ آيَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُ عُلَمَاءُ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ
english translation text:
Is it not a sign for them that the learned of the Children of Israel recognize it?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَلَوْ نَزَّلْنَاهُ عَلَىٰ بَعْضِ الْأَعْجَمِينَ
english translation text:
Had We sent it down upon some non-Arab
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَقَرَأَهُ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا بِهِ مُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
and had he recited it to them, they would not have believed in it.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ سَلَكْنَاهُ فِي قُلُوبِ الْمُجْرِمِينَ
english translation text:
This is how We let it pass through the hearts of the guilty:
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا الْعَذَابَ الْأَلِيمَ
english translation text:
they do not believe in it until they sight the painful punishment.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَيَأْتِيَهُم بَغْتَةً وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
english translation text:
It will overtake them suddenly while they are unaware.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَيَقُولُوا هَلْ نَحْنُ مُنظَرُونَ
english translation text:
Thereupon they will say, ‘Shall we be granted any respite?’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
english translation text:
So do they seek to hasten on Our punishment?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَفَرَأَيْتَ إِن مَّتَّعْنَاهُمْ سِنِينَ
english translation text:
Tell me, should We let them enjoy for some years,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: ثُمَّ جَاءَهُم مَّا كَانُوا يُوعَدُونَ
english translation text:
then there comes to them what they have been promised,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: مَا أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا يُمَتَّعُونَ
english translation text:
of what avail to them will be that which they were given to enjoy?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
english translation text:
We have not destroyed any town without its having warners,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: ذِكْرَىٰ وَمَا كُنَّا ظَالِمِينَ
english translation text:
for the sake of admonition, and We were not unjust.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا تَنَزَّلَتْ بِهِ الشَّيَاطِينُ
english translation text:
It has not been brought down by the devils.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَمَا يَنبَغِي لَهُمْ وَمَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
english translation text:
Neither does it behoove them, nor are they capable [of doing that].
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّهُمْ عَنِ السَّمْعِ لَمَعْزُولُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed, they are kept at bay [even] from hearing it.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُعَذَّبِينَ
english translation text:
So do not invoke any god besides Allah, lest you should be among the punished.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَأَنذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ الْأَقْرَبِينَ
english translation text:
Warn the nearest of your kinsfolk,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَاخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
and lower your wing to the faithful who follow you.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّي بَرِيءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
english translation text:
But if they disobey you, say, ‘I am absolved of what you do.’
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى الْعَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
And put your trust in the All-mighty, the All-merciful,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: الَّذِي يَرَاكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
english translation text:
who sees you when you stand [for prayer],
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَتَقَلُّبَكَ فِي السَّاجِدِينَ
english translation text:
and your going about among those who prostrate.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِنَّهُ هُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed He is the All-hearing, the All-knowing.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ الشَّيَاطِينُ
english translation text:
Should I inform you on whom the devils descend?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: تَنَزَّلُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ أَفَّاكٍ أَثِيمٍ
english translation text:
They descend on every sinful liar.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: يُلْقُونَ السَّمْعَ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ كَاذِبُونَ
english translation text:
They eavesdrop, and most of them are liars.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَالشُّعَرَاءُ يَتَّبِعُهُمُ الْغَاوُونَ
english translation text:
As for the poets, [only] the perverse follow them.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِي كُلِّ وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ
english translation text:
Have you not regarded that they rove in every valley,
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَأَنَّهُمْ يَقُولُونَ مَا لَا يَفْعَلُونَ
english translation text:
and that they say what they do not do?
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: إِلَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ وَذَكَرُوا اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَانتَصَرُوا مِن بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا ۗ
english translation text:
Barring those who have faith, do righteous deeds, and remember Allah much often, and vindicate themselves after they have been wronged.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: وَسَيَعْلَمُ الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا أَيَّ مُنقَلَبٍ يَنقَلِبُونَ
english translation text:
And the wrongdoers will soon know at what goal they will end up.
Ash Shu’ara – The Poets

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: طس ۚ تِلْكَ آيَاتُ الْقُرْآنِ وَكِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
Ta, Seen. These are the signs of the Quran and a manifest Book,
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: هُدًى وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
a guidance and good news for the faithful
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: الَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ الزَّكَاةَ وَهُم بِالْآخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
english translation text:
—those who maintain the prayer and pay the zakat, and who are certain of the Hereafter.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْآخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمْ أَعْمَالَهُمْ فَهُمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
english translation text:
As for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made their deeds seem decorous to them, and so they are bewildered.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: أُولَٰئِكَ الَّذِينَ لَهُمْ سُوءُ الْعَذَابِ وَهُمْ فِي الْآخِرَةِ هُمُ الْأَخْسَرُونَ
english translation text:
They are the ones for whom there is a terrible punishment, and they are the ones who will be the biggest losers in the Hereafter.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى الْقُرْآنَ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ
english translation text:
Indeed you receive the Quran from One who is all-wise, all-knowing.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: إِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهْلِهِ إِنِّي آنَسْتُ نَارًا سَآتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوْ آتِيكُم بِشِهَابٍ قَبَسٍ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَصْطَلُونَ
english translation text:
When Moses said to his family, ‘Indeed I descry a fire! I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand so that you may warm yourselves.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَلَمَّا جَاءَهَا نُودِيَ أَن بُورِكَ مَن فِي النَّارِ وَمَنْ حَوْلَهَا وَسُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
When he came to it, he was called: ‘Blessed is He who is in the fire and who is [as well] around it, and immaculate is Allah, the Lord of all the worlds!’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: يَا مُوسَىٰ إِنَّهُ أَنَا اللَّهُ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
english translation text:
‘O Moses! Indeed I am Allah, the All-mighty, the All-wise.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ ۚ فَلَمَّا رَآهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَانٌّ وَلَّىٰ مُدْبِرًا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ ۚ يَا مُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفْ إِنِّي لَا يَخَافُ لَدَيَّ الْمُرْسَلُونَ
english translation text:
‘Throw down your staff!’ When he saw it wriggling, as if it were a snake, he turned his back [to flee], without looking back. ‘O Moses! ‘Do not be afraid. Indeed the apostles are not afraid before Me,
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: إِلَّا مَن ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسْنًا بَعْدَ سُوءٍ فَإِنِّي غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
english translation text:
nor those who do wrong and then make up for [their] fault with goodness, for indeed I am all-forgiving, all-merciful.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَأَدْخِلْ يَدَكَ فِي جَيْبِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَاءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوءٍ ۖ فِي تِسْعِ آيَاتٍ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَقَوْمِهِ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا قَوْمًا فَاسِقِينَ
english translation text:
‘Insert your hand into your shirt. It will emerge white and bright, without any fault—among nine signs meant for Pharaoh and his people. Indeed they are a transgressing lot.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَلَمَّا جَاءَتْهُمْ آيَاتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا هَٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
But when Our signs came to them, as eye-openers, they said, ‘This is plain magic.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَجَحَدُوا بِهَا وَاسْتَيْقَنَتْهَا أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا ۚ فَانظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الْمُفْسِدِينَ
english translation text:
They impugned them, wrongfully and out of arrogance, though they were convinced in their hearts [of their veracity]. So observe how the fate of the agents of corruption was!
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَا دَاوُودَ وَسُلَيْمَانَ عِلْمًا ۖ وَقَالَا الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
Certainly, We gave knowledge to David and Solomon, and they said, ‘All praise belongs to Allah, who granted us an advantage over many of His faithful servants.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَوَرِثَ سُلَيْمَانُ دَاوُودَ ۖ وَقَالَ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ عُلِّمْنَا مَنطِقَ الطَّيْرِ وَأُوتِينَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْءٍ ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ الْفَضْلُ الْمُبِينُ
english translation text:
Solomon inherited from David, and he said, ‘O people! We have been taught the speech of the birds, and we have been given out of everything. Indeed this is a manifest advantage.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَحُشِرَ لِسُلَيْمَانَ جُنُودُهُ مِنَ الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنسِ وَالطَّيْرِ فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
english translation text:
[Once] Solomon’s hosts were marched out for him, comprising jinn, humans and birds, and they were held in check.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا أَتَوْا عَلَىٰ وَادِ النَّمْلِ قَالَتْ نَمْلَةٌ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّمْلُ ادْخُلُوا مَسَاكِنَكُمْ لَا يَحْطِمَنَّكُمْ سُلَيْمَانُ وَجُنُودُهُ وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
english translation text:
When they came to the Valley of Ants, an ant said, ‘O ants! Enter your dwellings, lest Solomon and his hosts should trample on you while they are unaware.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَالِدَيَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِي عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ
english translation text:
Whereat he smiled, amused at its words, and he said, ‘My Lord! Inspire me to give thanks for Your blessing with which You have blessed me and my parents, and that I may do righteous deeds which please You, and admit me, by Your mercy, among Your righteous servants.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَتَفَقَّدَ الطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِيَ لَا أَرَى الْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كَانَ مِنَ الْغَائِبِينَ
english translation text:
[One day] he reviewed the birds, and said, ‘Why do I not see the hoopoe? Or is he absent?’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: لَأُعَذِّبَنَّهُ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا أَوْ لَأَذْبَحَنَّهُ أَوْ لَيَأْتِيَنِّي بِسُلْطَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
‘I will punish him with a severe punishment, or I will behead him, unless he brings me a credible excuse.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ
english translation text:
He did not stay for long [before he turned up] and said, ‘I have alighted on something which you have not alighted on, and I have brought you from Sheba a definite report.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: إِنِّي وَجَدتُّ امْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
english translation text:
I found a woman ruling over them, and she has been given everything, and she has a great throne.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ الشَّيْطَانُ أَعْمَالَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ السَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
english translation text:
I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allah, and Satan has made their deeds seem decorous to them—thus he has barred them from the way [of Allah], so they are not guided—
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا لِلَّهِ الَّذِي يُخْرِجُ الْخَبْءَ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
english translation text:
so that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, who brings forth the hidden in the heavens and the earth, and He knows whatever you hide and whatever you disclose.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ ۩
english translation text:
Allah—there is no god except Him—is the Lord of the Great Throne.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ الْكَاذِبِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘We shall see whether you are truthful, or if you are one of the liars.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: اذْهَب بِّكِتَابِي هَٰذَا فَأَلْقِهْ إِلَيْهِمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَانظُرْ مَاذَا يَرْجِعُونَ
english translation text:
Take this letter of mine and deliver it to them. Then draw away from them and observe what [response] they return.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَتْ يَا أَيُّهَا الْمَلَأُ إِنِّي أُلْقِيَ إِلَيَّ كِتَابٌ كَرِيمٌ
english translation text:
She said, ‘O [members of the] elite! Indeed a noble letter has been delivered to me.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: إِنَّهُ مِن سُلَيْمَانَ وَإِنَّهُ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
It is from Solomon, and it begins in the name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: أَلَّا تَعْلُوا عَلَيَّ وَأْتُونِي مُسْلِمِينَ
english translation text:
[It states,] ‘‘Do not defy me, and come to me in submission.’’ ’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَتْ يَا أَيُّهَا الْمَلَأُ أَفْتُونِي فِي أَمْرِي مَا كُنتُ قَاطِعَةً أَمْرًا حَتَّىٰ تَشْهَدُونِ
english translation text:
She said, ‘O [members of the] elite! Give me your opinion concerning my matter. I do not decide any matter until you are present.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالُوا نَحْنُ أُولُو قُوَّةٍ وَأُولُو بَأْسٍ شَدِيدٍ وَالْأَمْرُ إِلَيْكِ فَانظُرِي مَاذَا تَأْمُرِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘We are powerful and possess a great might. But it is up to you to command. So consider what orders you will give.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَتْ إِنَّ الْمُلُوكَ إِذَا دَخَلُوا قَرْيَةً أَفْسَدُوهَا وَجَعَلُوا أَعِزَّةَ أَهْلِهَا أَذِلَّةً ۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
english translation text:
She said, ‘Indeed when kings enter a town, they devastate it, and make the mightiest of its people the weakest. That is how they act.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَإِنِّي مُرْسِلَةٌ إِلَيْهِم بِهَدِيَّةٍ فَنَاظِرَةٌ بِمَ يَرْجِعُ الْمُرْسَلُونَ
english translation text:
I will send them a gift, and see what the envoys bring back.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَلَمَّا جَاءَ سُلَيْمَانَ قَالَ أَتُمِدُّونَنِ بِمَالٍ فَمَا آتَانِيَ اللَّهُ خَيْرٌ مِّمَّا آتَاكُم بَلْ أَنتُم بِهَدِيَّتِكُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ
english translation text:
So when he came to Solomon, he said, ‘Are you aiding me with wealth? What Allah has given me is better than what He has given you. Indeed, you are proud of your gift!
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: ارْجِعْ إِلَيْهِمْ فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّهُم بِجُنُودٍ لَّا قِبَلَ لَهُم بِهَا وَلَنُخْرِجَنَّهُم مِّنْهَا أَذِلَّةً وَهُمْ صَاغِرُونَ
english translation text:
Go back to them, for we will come at them with hosts which they cannot face, and we will expel them from it, abased and degraded.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَ يَا أَيُّهَا الْمَلَأُ أَيُّكُمْ يَأْتِينِي بِعَرْشِهَا قَبْلَ أَن يَأْتُونِي مُسْلِمِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘O [members of the] elite! Which of you will bring me her throne before they come to me in submission?’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَ عِفْرِيتٌ مِّنَ الْجِنِّ أَنَا آتِيكَ بِهِ قَبْلَ أَن تَقُومَ مِن مَّقَامِكَ ۖ وَإِنِّي عَلَيْهِ لَقَوِيٌّ أَمِينٌ
english translation text:
An afreet from among the jinn said, ‘I will bring it to you before you rise from your place. I have the power to do it and am trustworthy.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَ الَّذِي عِندَهُ عِلْمٌ مِّنَ الْكِتَابِ أَنَا آتِيكَ بِهِ قَبْلَ أَن يَرْتَدَّ إِلَيْكَ طَرْفُكَ ۚ
english translation text:
The one who had knowledge of the Book said, ‘I will bring it to you in the twinkling of an eye.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قفَلَمَّا رَآهُ مُسْتَقِرًّا عِندَهُ قَالَ هَٰذَا مِن فَضْلِ رَبِّي لِيَبْلُوَنِي أَأَشْكُرُ أَمْ أَكْفُرُ ۖ
english translation text:
So when he saw it set near him, he said, ‘This is by the grace of my Lord, to test me if I will give thanks or be ungrateful.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَمَن شَكَرَ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِ ۖ وَمَن كَفَرَ فَإِنَّ رَبِّي غَنِيٌّ كَرِيمٌ
english translation text:
Whoever gives thanks, gives thanks only for his own sake. And whoever is ungrateful [should know that] my Lord is indeed all-sufficient, all-generous.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَ نَكِّرُوا لَهَا عَرْشَهَا نَنظُرْ أَتَهْتَدِي أَمْ تَكُونُ مِنَ الَّذِينَ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Disguise her throne for her, so that we may see whether she is discerning or if she is one of the undiscerning ones.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَلَمَّا جَاءَتْ قِيلَ أَهَٰكَذَا عَرْشُكِ ۖ قَالَتْ كَأَنَّهُ هُوَ ۚ وَأُوتِينَا الْعِلْمَ مِن قَبْلِهَا وَكُنَّا مُسْلِمِينَ
english translation text:
So when she came, it was said [to her], ‘Is your throne like this one?’ She said, ‘It seems to be the same, and we were informed before it, and we had submitted.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَصَدَّهَا مَا كَانَت تَّعْبُدُ مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّهَا كَانَتْ مِن قَوْمٍ كَافِرِينَ
english translation text:
She had been barred [from the way of Allah] by what she used to worship besides Allah, for she belonged to a faithless people.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قِيلَ لَهَا ادْخُلِي الصَّرْحَ ۖ فَلَمَّا رَأَتْهُ حَسِبَتْهُ لُجَّةً وَكَشَفَتْ عَن سَاقَيْهَا ۚ قَالَ إِنَّهُ صَرْحٌ مُّمَرَّدٌ مِّن قَوَارِيرَ ۗ
english translation text:
It was said to her, ‘Enter the palace.’ So when she saw it, she supposed it to be a pool of water, and she bared her shanks. He said, ‘It is a palace paved with crystal.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَتْ رَبِّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي وَأَسْلَمْتُ مَعَ سُلَيْمَانَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
She said, ‘My Lord! Indeed I have wronged myself, and I submit with Solomon to Allah, the Lord of all the worlds.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَىٰ ثَمُودَ أَخَاهُمْ صَالِحًا أَنِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ فَإِذَا هُمْ فَرِيقَانِ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
english translation text:
Certainly We sent to Thamud Salih, their brother, [with the summons:] ‘Worship Allah!’ But thereat they became two groups contending with each other.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ لِمَ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ بِالسَّيِّئَةِ قَبْلَ الْحَسَنَةِ ۖ لَوْلَا تَسْتَغْفِرُونَ اللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘O My people! Why do you press for evil sooner than for good? Why do you not plead to Allah for forgiveness so that you may receive His mercy?’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالُوا اطَّيَّرْنَا بِكَ وَبِمَن مَّعَكَ ۚ قَالَ طَائِرُكُمْ عِندَ اللَّهِ ۖ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تُفْتَنُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘We take you and those who are with you for a bad omen.’ He said, ‘Your bad omens are from Allah. Indeed, you are a people being tested.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَكَانَ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ تِسْعَةُ رَهْطٍ يُفْسِدُونَ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
english translation text:
There were nine persons in the city who caused corruption in the land and did not set things right.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قَالُوا تَقَاسَمُوا بِاللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُ وَأَهْلَهُ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِ مَا شَهِدْنَا مَهْلِكَ أَهْلِهِ وَإِنَّا لَصَادِقُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Swear by Allah that we will attack him and his family by night. Then we will tell his heir that we were not present at the murder of his family and that we speak the truth.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَمَكَرُوا مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
english translation text:
They devised a plot, and We [too] devised a plan, but they were not aware.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَانظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ مَكْرِهِمْ أَنَّا دَمَّرْنَاهُمْ وَقَوْمَهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
So observe how was the outcome of their plotting, as We destroyed them and all their people.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَتِلْكَ بُيُوتُهُمْ خَاوِيَةً بِمَا ظَلَمُوا ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
So there lay their houses, fallen in ruin because of their wrongdoing. There is indeed a sign in that for a people who have knowledge.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَأَنجَيْنَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَكَانُوا يَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
And We delivered those who had faith and were Godwary.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَلُوطًا إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِ أَتَأْتُونَ الْفَاحِشَةَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
english translation text:
[We also sent] Lot, when he said to his people, ‘What! Do you commit this indecency while you look on?
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: أَئِنَّكُمْ لَتَأْتُونَ الرِّجَالَ شَهْوَةً مِّن دُونِ النِّسَاءِ ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تَجْهَلُونَ
english translation text:
Do you approach men with [sexual] desire instead of women?! Indeed, you are a senseless lot!’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ إِلَّا أَن قَالُوا أَخْرِجُوا آلَ لُوطٍ مِّن قَرْيَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ أُنَاسٌ يَتَطَهَّرُونَ
english translation text:
But the only answer of his people was that they said, ‘Expel Lot’s family from your town! They are indeed a puritanical lot.’
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: فَأَنجَيْنَاهُ وَأَهْلَهُ إِلَّا امْرَأَتَهُ قَدَّرْنَاهَا مِنَ الْغَابِرِينَ
english translation text:
So We delivered him and his family, except his wife. We ordained her to be among those who remained behind.
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَاءَ مَطَرُ الْمُنذَرِينَ
english translation text:
Then We poured down upon them a rain [of stones]. Evil was that rain for those who had been warned!
An Naml – The Ant

arabic text: قُلِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَامٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَىٰ ۗ آللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
english translation text:
Say, ‘All praise belongs to Allah, and Peace be to the servants whom He has chosen.’ Is Allah better, or the partners they ascribe [to Him]?
An Naml – The Ant
